Values.value: Partner declaration failed, cannot continue with VFS declaration. Message was %zz.config.mft.vfs:declareVfsLocals/declarePartnerOutcome/message%

BRANCH.COMMENT: If No partner we need to drop the id altogether in the query

Values.value: VFS with Name %declaredVfsDetails/vfsName% already exists for partner %declaredPartnerInfo/name%
VFS with Name %declaredVfsDetails/vfsName% for partner %declaredPartnerInfo/name% declared successfully
VFS with Name %declaredVfsDetails/vfsName% for partner %declaredPartnerInfo/name% declaration failed at update step. Message was %zz.config.mft.vfs:declareVfsLocals/updateOutcome/message%
VFS with Name %declaredVfsDetails/vfsName% for partner %declaredPartnerInfo/name% declaration failed at add step. Message was %zz.config.mft.vfs:declareVfsLocals/vfsAddOutcome/message%
